ideas.title: Per-run token & cost efficiency meter on the ~/factory tab
ideas.why: World signal 'Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading the prompt' + ontology 'Agent token overhead'/'Token budgeting' — the front page is scrutinizing wasted context, so surface tokens-before-useful-work, tokens/task, and cost/run over time as a transparent dashboard.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette for search & navigation
ideas.why: Destination lens (Linear/Vercel command palettes) + ontology 'Agent-computer interface (ACI)' — effortless content discovery across posts and /kb concepts; explicitly allowed (palette, not a shell).

ideas.title: Live brain-activity / execution-trace visualization (canvas)
ideas.why: Ontology 'Agent execution tracing' + 'Mechanistic interpretability' + world signal 'explain model internals rather than black boxes' — animate the real loop (reflect→propose→gate→ship→verify) from status.json as a whoa-factor showpiece.

ideas.title: Interactive sparse-autoencoder 'feature' explorer showpiece
ideas.why: Ontology 'Sparse autoencoder'/'Circuit tracing'/'Superposition' — a playable canvas that visualizes how superposed features disentangle, teaching a specific concept the brain knows as a memorable, shareable interaction.

ideas.title: Reading time + copyable permalink/share on every post
ideas.why: Destination lens (Stripe/Ghost reading UX) — reading time and a permalink anchor are table-stakes solid reading UX this blog is missing; small, pure, testable.

ideas.title: Generate a valid RSS/Atom feed at build time + test
ideas.why: Ontology 'POSSE syndication'/'Indie web' + audience-growth signal — a self-contained static feed.xml lets readers and dev.to/newsletter pipelines subscribe; a schema test guards it in the 100% gate.
